def negative_repeated_split_or_join_on_invariant_separator_inside_loop():
    rule_id = "repeated_split_or_join_on_invariant_separator_inside_loop"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag loops that repeatedly rebuild the same separator-driven string operations."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
